# agent-action-policy

> Declarative action policies for AI agents — approve, deny, or escalate any tool call before execution.

`pip install agent-action-policy` | `[yaml]` for YAML | Python >=3.9 | zero required deps

## API

### PolicyEngine(policies=None, default_action=Action.APPROVE, default_reason="")

Core engine. First matching policy (by priority) wins.

| param | type | default | description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| policies | list[PolicyRule]|None | None | auto-sorted by priority (lower=first) |
| default_action | Action | APPROVE | when no policy matches. DENY for fail-closed |
| default_reason | str | "" | auto-generated if empty |

Class methods:
- `.from_yaml(path, **kwargs) -> PolicyEngine` — load from YAML file (requires `[yaml]` extra)
- `.from_dict(data, **kwargs) -> PolicyEngine` — load from dict with `policies` key
- `.from_template(name, **kwargs) -> PolicyEngine` — built-in: `safe_coding`, `safe_browsing`, `safe_database`, `strict`

Instance methods:
- `.evaluate(tool: str, args: dict|str|None=None) -> Decision` — evaluate tool call against policies
- `.guard(func) -> Callable` — decorator; raises `PolicyDenied`/`PolicyEscalated` on blocked calls
- `.add_policy(policy: PolicyRule) -> None` — add and re-sort
- `.policies -> list[PolicyRule]` — sorted copy (property)

### PolicyRule(name, action, reason="", tool_pattern="*", args_pattern=None, path_patterns=(), priority=100)

Frozen dataclass. All specified patterns must match (AND logic).

| field | type | description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| tool_pattern | str | exact `"bash"`, glob `"file_*"`, regex `"~(bash\|shell)"` |
| args_pattern | str\|None | regex matched against stringified args |
| path_patterns | tuple[str,...] | glob/regex for file paths extracted from args (keys: path, file_path, filename, file, filepath) |
| priority | int | lower = higher priority (default 100) |

Methods: `.matches(tool, args=None) -> bool`, `.to_decision() -> Decision`

### Action (Enum)

`APPROVE` | `DENY` | `ESCALATE`

### Decision(action, policy_name="", reason="")

Frozen dataclass. Properties: `.approved`, `.denied`, `.escalated` (all bool).

### Exceptions

- `PolicyDenied(decision)` — raised by `@guard` on DENY. `.decision` attribute.
- `PolicyEscalated(decision)` — raised by `@guard` on ESCALATE. `.decision` attribute.

### Loaders

```python
from action_policy.loader import load_policies_from_yaml, load_policies_from_dict
from action_policy.policy import policy_from_dict
```

## Pattern Matching

| type | syntax | example |
|------|--------|---------|
| tool exact | `"bash"` | matches only "bash" |
| tool glob | `"file_*"` | matches file_read, file_write |
| tool regex | `"~(bash\|shell)"` | ~ prefix = regex |
| args regex | `"git\\s+push\\s+--force"` | always regex, against stringified args |
| path glob | `"/etc/*"` | standard glob |
| path regex | `"~\\.env$"` | ~ prefix = regex |

Regex patterns are compiled and cached via `@lru_cache(256)`.

## Built-in Templates

**safe_coding** — deny: force push (main/master), destructive git, skip hooks, system file writes. escalate: rm -rf, credential access.

**safe_browsing** — deny: internal/localhost URLs, file:// protocol. escalate: downloads.

**safe_database** — deny: DDL (DROP/TRUNCATE/ALTER/CREATE). escalate: DELETE, UPDATE without WHERE.

**strict** — approve: read-only tools only. Use with `default_action=Action.DENY`.

## YAML Format

```yaml
policies:
  - name: "rule-name"
    match:
      tool: "pattern"          # exact/glob/~regex (default: "*")
      args_pattern: "regex"    # optional
      path_patterns: ["/etc/*", "~\\.env$"]  # optional
    action: "approve|deny|escalate"
    reason: "explanation"
    priority: 100              # lower = higher priority
```

## Examples

```python
# Template
engine = PolicyEngine.from_template("safe_coding")
engine.evaluate("bash", {"command": "git push --force"}).denied  # True

# Fail-closed
engine = PolicyEngine.from_template("strict", default_action=Action.DENY)
engine.evaluate("read_file", {"path": "README.md"}).approved  # True
engine.evaluate("bash", {"command": "npm install"}).denied     # True

# Decorator guard
@engine.guard
def execute(tool, args=None): ...
try: execute("bash", args={"command": "rm -rf /"})
except PolicyEscalated as e: print(e.decision.reason)

# Custom + combine
engine.add_policy(PolicyRule(name="no-pip", action=Action.ESCALATE,
    tool_pattern="bash", args_pattern=r"pip\s+install", priority=15))
```

[Docs](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/agent-action-policy) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/agent-action-policy/) | [Source](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/agent-action-policy)
